class.name: PuertsLuaBackend
class.brief_description: Backend resource for running Lua through Puerts.
class.description: Instantiate [PuertsLuaBackend] and pass it to [method PuertsEnvironment.initialize] to create a Puerts environment backed by Lua.

method.name: _puerts_get_functions_ptr
method.description: Returns an internal pointer to the Puerts backend function table. This method exists for extension internals. Do not call it from gameplay code.
